hooks.name: File Protection
hooks.description: Block modifications to /data directory to prevent corruption of source datasets

hooks.name: Query Parameter Validation
hooks.description: Warn when editing Go API handlers that may have unsafe query parameter handling
hooks.prompt: You're about to edit an API handler file. Does this change validate query parameters (limit, page) with lower bounds (e.g., limit >= 1)? If editing handlers.go or similar, confirm parameter validation is present. $ARGUMENTS

hooks.name: Content-Type Enforcement
hooks.description: Warn if adding raw JSON encoding instead of using writeJSON() helper
hooks.prompt: Are you adding a new API response handler in this Go file? If so, please use the writeJSON() helper function to set Content-Type: application/json automatically. Do not call json.NewEncoder(w).Encode directly. Confirm you'll use writeJSON(). $ARGUMENTS

hooks.name: Go Formatting
hooks.description: Automatically format Go files after modifications using gofmt
